description: CompositionBlack T-shirt made of 58% cotton and 42% polyester, is engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has a round neck, short sleeves, and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironGo by the graphic print and fire up the court with a heated tennis match in this T-shirt from nike. Crafted from soft cotton-polyester blend fabric and engineered with Dri-Fit technology, this T-shirt offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great everyday wear for your tennis matches and on casual days. Team this tee with jeans and tennis shoes for a sporty look. Add on a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during winters.
